location.office_time_required: occasionally required to work out of assigned Affirm office for proximal roles

level_signals: 7+ years of experience in strategic partnerships, business development, or a similar growth-focused role
This is an individual contributor role without direct reports
OTE range $186K-$285K depending on state, consistent with senior IC compensation

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of experience in strategic partnerships, business development, or a similar growth-focused role, ideally in high-growth tech or fintech environments.
Proven track record of delivering measurable growth through partnerships—not just managing relationships, but expanding them.
Strong commercial instincts with the ability to assess opportunities and drive deals from ideation to execution.
Understanding of go-to-market strategy development and cross-functional execution.
Excellent relationship-building, communication, and negotiation skills.
Highly self-motivated and results-driven, with a strong sense of ownership and urgency.
Experience navigating fast-paced, ambiguous environments with evolving priorities.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in fintech, e-commerce, or financial services.
Prior experience working with or within high-impact partner ecosystems.

explicitly_excluded: Visa sponsorship is not available for this position.

scope.surface: Named portfolio of existing payments partnerships; merchant acquisition and expansion across eCommerce, in-store, telesales, and Affirm app
scope.business_model: B2B payments / BNPL platform — merchant-facing partnerships
core_responsibilities: Own and grow a named portfolio of existing payments partnerships, focusing on expanding business value, accelerating revenue, and driving merchant acquisition.
Identify new opportunities within existing partner relationships that align with Affirm's growth objectives.
Execute go-to-market strategies tailored to each partnership, including cross-functional execution plans.
Negotiate partnership amendments and renewals as needed to support evolving business objectives.
Build trusted relationships within partner organizations, from working teams to mid-level leaders.
Monitor and optimize partnership performance using data-driven insights, ensuring alignment with KPIs and strategic goals.
Act as an internal advocate for partners, while upholding a high standard for performance, innovation, and value creation.
Collaborate closely with Product and Marketing to support roadmaps and campaigns that enhance the success of strategic partners.

compensation.equity_form: Equity Grade 6; ESPP (employee stock purchase plan enabling purchase of Affirm shares at a discount); equity rewards mentioned as part of total compensation package
compensation.additional_comp_notes: USA On Target Earnings (CA, WA, NY, NJ, CT) per year: $210,000 - $285,000; USA On Target Earnings (all other U.S. states) per year: $186,000 - $261,000. OTE includes annual base pay and sales incentive target.

green_flags: OTE compensation range disclosed and competitive ($186K-$285K depending on state)
Remote-first company with broad US remote eligibility
Explicit statement that this is an individual contributor role (no people management ambiguity)
100% subsidized medical, dental, and vision coverage for employee and dependents
ESPP and equity rewards included in compensation package
Clear scope: named portfolio of existing payments partnerships
red_flags: Visa sponsorship explicitly not available — eliminates candidates requiring sponsorship
OTE structure (not pure base salary) introduces variable income risk typical of sales-adjacent roles
7+ years minimum experience is a hard floor with limited bridgeability
Role straddles business development and account management — exact split of hunting vs. farming is ambiguous

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 7+ years requirement and OTE range)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and merchant partnership context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
compensation.base_range_usd (null — JD states OTE, not base separately)
archetype (BizOps / Strategy & Ops chosen as closest fit; role is a partnership growth/BD function not cleanly covered by PM archetypes)
ambiguities: JD tag is #LI-Remote but also mentions proximal roles occasionally working from assigned Affirm offices — unclear whether this specific role is fully remote or proximal. Treated as remote-us based on #LI-Remote tag and 'remote-first' language.
Compensation is stated as OTE (On Target Earnings) which blends base and variable incentive — base range alone is not disclosed.

The 'ideally in high-growth tech or fintech environments' qualifier on the 7+ years requirement could be read as preferred context rather than a hard requirement; treated as hard given unconditional bullet placement but noted here.
